steps.title: Identify what -4 represents in the linear function
steps.content: The function $t(x) = -4x + 72$ is a linear function in the form $f(x) = mx + b$. The value $-4$ is the coefficient of $x$, which is the slope of the line.

steps.title: Interpret the slope as the rate of change per hour
steps.content: In this context, $x$ represents hours after 6 p.m., so the slope tells us how much the temperature changes per hour. Since the slope is $-4$, the temperature decreases by 4 degrees Fahrenheit for each hour that passes. That matches the correct answer - A is correct.
